channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Unreadable signpost, 2nd June
item.description:
The corner of Eldersfield Close where the signpost is located - it is very old and unreadable
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eldersfield Close, Winchcombe, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pointless Temporary traffic lights!, 2nd June
item.description:
Temporary traffic lights have been dumped in this section of road as an attempt to avoid fixing the road, there are no signs of work being carried out, no contact details. This has been done to avoid fixing the shocking state of the road! Fix the road or remove the temp lights which have no legal reason to be here!!!!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Information board identifying emergency contact company/number not displayed

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 2nd June
item.description:
ENWD with Standard TM with fway closure FW sinkhole 200x200x60mm temp repair (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 2nd June
item.description:
28 day with Standard TM with fway closure please cut hedges (all sides) back to boundary approx 10m x 1m x 5.5m (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 2nd June
item.description:
28 day with Standard TM with fway closure please cut hedges (all sides) back to boundary approx 15m x 0.5m x 2.5m (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard damaged and hazardous. This was positioned here to protect Scrags Folly from vehicles turning wide at the junction and needs to be replaced., 2nd June
item.description:
As described

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cowley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Complete bollard is damaged (Non illuminating bollard or post)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 2nd June
item.description:
Damaged bollard Please arrange removal of remainder of bollard and replacement Stats Road closure (Damaged Bollard)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road marking white lines or studs problem, 2nd June
item.description:
Request for School Keep Clear Zig Zag markings. Grangefield Primary School, via the County Councillor Alex Hegenbarth, are asking for assistance with refreshing and installing markings on the approach road. We are going to be refreshing the white lining in the area, but they are requesting additional markings are installed to help keep the kids safe. This road has only recently been adopted by GCC.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 2nd June
item.description:
15db Loose noisy cover. Please lift, clean, investigate and reinstate. Road closure with 15db (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 2nd June
item.description:
Overgrown tree. Please cut back growth at base of tree 10m Standard TM with temp FW closure (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 2nd June
item.description:
Loose and rocking slab x 2 450x450mm x2 Standard TM with temp FW closure Stats (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 2nd June
item.description:
Broken loose and rocking slab 940x600mm Please lift and replace. Std TM with temp FW closure Stats Cutting may be required (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 2nd June
item.description:
Broken loose and rocking slab 600x300mm Please lift and replace. Std TM with temp FW closure Stats Cutting may be required (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 2nd June
item.description:
Customer reports a pothole at the location, which they have measured: width 15 inches, length 46 inches and around 3 inches at its deepest point.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two drains are completely blocked just uphill from the last houses . One is almost buried!, 2nd June
item.description:
Two drains on the lane are totally blocked. I’ve previously been told by Jake in the Highways department that they are unblocked annually. That is definitely not the case. These have not been dealt with for years. You’ll see the resulting surface water in the photo.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenhampton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 2nd June
item.description:
Damaged kerb Please repair with concrete 200x100x40mm Standard TM with temp FW closure (FW Kerbing Defects)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 2nd June
item.description:
Loose and rocking slab x2 440x440mm x 2 Standard TM with temp FW closure Stats (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface problem, 2nd June
item.description:
Caller reports, raised kerb is damged has been damaged. The slab/conreate is loose
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Building spoil/soil being removed off site by heavy truck leaving some material on the highway. Not acceptable. Please investigate, 2nd June
item.description:
Soil on highway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Swindon Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 2nd June
item.description:
